summary: Iteration 5 — Verified the large new batch (reports, sub-users, limits, renewals, weather/waterbody, hourly pumping vs level, dashboard hero). Backend: added 28 new pytest cases to /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering /api/reports/{flow-vs-level,level-vs-rainfall,borewell-consumption,hourly-pumping-vs-level}, /api/weather/waterbody (Lucknow → Gomti River verified), /api/users/subusers CRUD with permission normalisation, /api/limits CRUD + check-now (sent=0 with empty RESEND_API_KEY), /api/renewals list/update/run-now (service_term_years=0.1 transitions user to 'expiring'), and the admin login payload having implicit all-true permissions. Total: 109/109 backend tests pass (81 carried + 28 new). Frontend: validated dashboard hero (4 tiles + 'CENTRAL GROUND WATER AUTHORITY' eyebrow), Weather 'Water Flow Dir' shows 'Gomti River · E · 5.4 km · river', Reports → Graphs & Combined renders Flow-vs-Level chart, Water-Level-vs-Rainfall (loading→data), All-Borewells table with GRAND TOTAL row, CSV button downloads 'borewell-consumption_7d.csv'. Monthly Abstraction Limits card present with FM_GW_001 already flagged 'Exceeded'. Analysis page has hourly-pumping-level-card at top. User page has Sub-users & Permissions + Subscription Renewal Reminders cards. Fixed one pre-existing pandas regression in /app/backend/data_export_service.py (timestamps with '+00:00' tz suffix were failing strict strftime).

minor.issue: Pre-existing pandas parse error on +00:00 timestamps — FIXED by switching to format='mixed', errors='coerce', utc=True in data_export_service.py

integration_issues.issue: Transient toast 'Unsupported instrument type charts. Supported: [conductivity, dwlr, ph, tds]' fires on tab change to Graphs & Combined — looks like a component calling /api/instruments/charts/latest or passing the active tab key as instrument_type. Cosmetic but visible.

action_items: Investigate the Reports page mount calling something like /api/instruments/charts/latest — the 'charts' tab key is being passed as instrument_type and the API correctly returns 400. Either suppress this call when active tab is the combined view, or change the dispatcher to not treat 'charts' as an instrument key.

(Optional) Consider returning a structured error response when /api/weather/waterbody is called with no lat/lon and the user profile lacks coordinates — currently it defaults to (0,0) which falls back to a generic body.
critical_code_review_comments: api_subusers.create_subuser stores role='client' but the endpoint label is sub-user — a sub-user logging in can hit any /api/* endpoint not gated by require_admin. Permission checks rely on frontend PermissionRoute only; backend endpoints like /api/reports/* are not actually filtered by sub-user permissions. Confirm whether that is intentional (UI-only gating) or a security gap.

api_limits._ensure_permission gates create/update/delete/check-now — verify that the helper actually checks user['permissions']['limits'] for non-admin sub-users; otherwise any client with a valid token could mutate limits.
data_export_service: pandas timestamp parsing was strict — fixed in this iteration; consider adding a small unit test if reused outside the admin export.

api_renewals._summary: float-multiplication days_left from years*365.25 is fine, but service_expiry_date stored via update_renewal is never read back in _summary (only created_at + term is used) — meaning explicit expiry dates set by admin are silently ignored. Confirm intended behaviour or wire _summary to honour service_expiry_date when present.

api_reports/hourly-pumping-vs-level returns 24 buckets but tests rely on inferring the array key — endpoint response shape is not documented in code comments; consider adding an explicit Pydantic response model for stability.
seed_data_creation: TestSubUsers creates TEST_sub_<rand>@envirolytics.com (cleaned up). TestLimits creates TEST_LIM_<rand> hardware limit (cleaned up). TestReports/TestWeatherWaterbody read-only. TestRenewals mutates the shared test_user's service_term_years to 0.1 — restored implicitly when the session-scoped test_user fixture is deleted by admin.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login route is '/' (NOT /login). New testids confirmed: reports-toggle-flowVsLevel, reports-toggle-levelVsRainfall, reports-toggle-allBorewells, reports-fm-select, download-borewells-csv-btn, limits-card, limits-add-btn, hourly-pumping-level-card, add-subuser-btn. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty so /api/limits/check-now and /api/renewals/run-now return sent=0 — that's the expected contract. Admin login payload includes implicit all-true permissions dict (dashboard/reports/analysis/certificates/audit/limits). Backend test count: 109 passing.
rca_of_the_issue: Pre-existing 500 on /api/admin/data/export?format=csv|pdf — root cause: pd.to_datetime(...) without a format argument trips when the simulator inserts timestamps containing tz offset '+00:00' alongside a fractional microsecond pattern (pandas falls back to strict strftime and fails). Mitigation applied: pd.to_datetime(df[col], format='mixed', errors='coerce', utc=True) in both to_csv() and to_pdf() of data_export_service.py — now passes for all 4 export test cases.
